DISCOVERY, 302, JUDGE PRO TEM BRUCE HIGHMAN RECUSES HIMSELF IN THIS CASE, AND MUST CONTINUE THE HEARING IN THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REQUESTS AN EARLIER CONTINUED HEARING DATE THAN THE AUGUST 24, 2015 DATE INDICATED IN THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING, AND ORDERS AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MATTHEW KUMIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF MATTHEW KUMIN'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE AND FOR A MONETARY SANCTION IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 12, 2015 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, DISCOVERY CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL SERVE NOTICE OF THE NEW CONTINUED HEARING DATE ON PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE HIGHMAN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MATTHEW KUMIN'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT [C.C.P. SEC. 664.6]. A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE PARTIES ENTERED INTO A VALID AGREEMENT TO DIVIDE ASSETS OF THEIR FORMER PARTNERSHIP THROUGH NOVEMBER 30, 2012. DEFENDANT SHALL: (1) PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH AN ACCOUNTING FOR ALL SUMS OWED TO PLAINTIFF ON THE MENBRENO MATTER AND PAY ALL SUMS OWED TO PLAINTIFF ON THE MENBRENO MATTER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE COURT'S ORDER; (2) PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH AN ACCOUNTING FOR ALL SUMS OWED TO PLAINTIFF IN THE RES CARE MATTER AND PAY ALL SUMS OWED TO PLAINTIFF ON THE RES CARE MATTER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF DEFENDANT'S RECEIPT OF THE RES CARE FUNDS; AND (3) PAY PLAINTIFF REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF RECEIPT OF PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNTING OF SUCH FEES AND COSTS AS PROVIDED FOR IN THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. A STATUS CONFERENCE IS SET FOR JUNE 5, 2015 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 613. (SEE ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff Matthew Kumins Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And For A Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOSE A. CORDOVA, ESQ., Tel No. 415-778-5114 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF MATTHEW KUMIN'S Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff Matthew Kumins Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And For A Monetary Sanction, the Motion to Compel Responses to Plaintiff's Request for Production of Documents, Set One is granted. Verified responses and responsive documents shall be served within 10 court days of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,560 and shall be paid by Defendant Sommers within 10 court days. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Advanced From May-22-15 To May-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Pltf. Matthew Kumin'S Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Plaintiff Matthew Kumin's Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement is a duplicate entry.

MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSE A. CORDOVA, TEL.NO. 205-1199 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEPHEN SOMMERS, TEL. NO. 524-2860 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW KUMIN's MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT is Granted. The Plaintiff has satisfied all the requirements for obtaining a writ of attachment. He has alleged an unsecured commercial claim for more than $500 and has shown that it is more likely than not that he will obtain a judgment in his favor due to the parties' stipulation that they entered into a valid agreement and plaintiff is seeking enforcement of the agreement. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =302/HK

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement [C.C.P. Â§664.6]
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSE A. CORDOVA, TEL.NO. 205-1199 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEPHEN SOMMERS, TEL. NO. 524-2860 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MATTHEW KUMIN's Motion To Enforce Settlement [C.C.P. Sec. 664.6] is Granted. The parties entered into a valid agreement to divide assets of their former partnership through November 30, 2012. Defendant shall: (1) provide plaintiff with an accounting for all sums owed to plaintiff on the Menbreno matter and pay all sums owed to plaintiff on the Menbreno matter within 15 days of the Court's order; (2) provide plaintiff with an accounting for all sums owed to plaintiff in the Res Care matter and pay all sums owed to plaintiff on the Res Care matter within 15 days of defendant's receipt of the Res Care funds; and (3) pay plaintiff reasonable attorney's fees and costs within 15 days of receipt of plaintiff's accounting of such fees and costs as provided for in the settlement agreement. A Status Conference is set for June 5, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 613. (See Order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =302/hk
